sections_cited: section 47 of the Sales Tax Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SSTRA No. 163 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For order on CMA No. 1822/2025 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of Main Case 21.01.2026 Mr. Zia Ahmed, Advocate for the Applicant Pursuant to Order dated 02.09.2025, learned counsel does not press this Reference Application. Dismissed as not pressed. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tax Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 of the Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Amjad PS
